summary: Dashboard UI refinement testing completed successfully. All 12 frontend features tested and working. Backend API (14/14 tests passed). Dashboard displays company data, compliance score with trend indicator, quick stats grid, recharts visualizations (AreaChart, PieChart, BarChart), category cards with progress, and upcoming deadlines sidebar. All navigation and interactions work correctly.

issues: Recharts console warning about width/height being -1 during initial render. This is a known recharts issue when ResponsiveContainer parent has no explicit height. Does not affect visual rendering - charts render correctly.
design_issues.recommendation: Consider adding explicit height to chart container divs (e.g., h-64 class already applied is correct)

issues: Minor React warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - accessibility improvement recommended

passed_tests: Dashboard page loads correctly at /dashboard route
Dashboard auto-redirects to /dashboard/{companyId} with first company from DB
Dashboard displays company data (name: 'Test Mining Corp', sector: 'mining', sub_sector: 'Base Metals')
Compliance Score card shows 14% with +7% trend indicator
Quick stats grid shows Total (7), Critical (2), Priority (3), Completed (1) cards
Compliance Trend area chart renders with 6-month data (Jul-Dec)
Severity Distribution donut chart renders with 4 segments and legend (Critical:2, High:3, Medium:2, Low:0)
Legislation Categories section shows 5 category cards with progress bars
Category Overview horizontal bar chart renders correctly
Upcoming Deadlines sidebar shows 2 deadline items with countdown
View Full Matrix button navigates to /compliance/{companyId}
Navigation to Compliance Matrix via nav button works correctly
Category buttons navigate to compliance page with category filter in URL
Deadline items are clickable and navigate to compliance page
Mobile menu button visible on tablet viewport (768px)
Mobile menu sheet opens correctly with navigation options
Backend /api/dashboard/stats/{company_id} returns all required fields
Backend returns trend_data array with 6 months of score/completed data
Backend returns severity_breakdown array with 4 items (Critical, High, Medium, Low)
Backend returns 404 for invalid company ID
critical_code_review_comments: Recharts ResponsiveContainer shows console warnings about negative dimensions during initial render. This is a known issue but doesn't affect functionality. Consider wrapping in a component that ensures parent container has explicit dimensions before mounting charts.
seed_data_creation: Used existing company 'Test Mining Corp' (ID: 15b507cc-00d4-4c61-88c6-e83e4c534efd) from database
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dashboard UI refinement with recharts integration is complete and fully functional. Backend API returns trend_data and severity_breakdown arrays. Real company data 'Test Mining Corp' in mining/Base Metals sector is being used. Charts render correctly despite console warnings.
